_comment: Registry of project-scoped MCP servers: the source of truth for the install-mcp skill (human catalog at docs/mcp/project-servers.md; keep both in sync). Each `dep` is an apm.yml `dependencies.mcp` self-defined entry. `secrets` stay as ${VAR} and are env-checked only; `prompts` are values substituted for the {{KEY}} placeholder before writing (never env-interpolated).

tessl.summary: Tessl platform for AI-assisted software engineering workflows.
tessl.notes: Either run `tessl auth login` once, or export TESSL_TOKEN (generate with `tessl api-key create`).

stitch.summary: Google Stitch hosted tooling over HTTP.
stitch.notes: Requires a valid X-Goog-Api-Key header from STITCH_API_KEY.

directus.summary: Directus instance: collections, fields, items, files, flows, schema.

prompts.ask: Your Directus instance /mcp endpoint URL (e.g. https://cms.example.com/mcp)

directus.notes: DIRECTUS_TOKEN is a generated bearer token.

claude-design.summary: Anthropic hosted design MCP backing Claude's design/artifact styling.
claude-design.notes: Authenticates through existing Claude Code credentials, no extra secret needed.

orbit.summary: GitLab Orbit tooling over the GitLab API.
orbit.notes: If your GitLab instance rejects unauthenticated requests, add an `Authorization: Bearer ${GITLAB_TOKEN}` header to the dep and export GITLAB_TOKEN. Point the URL at your own instance if not gitlab.com.

jcodemunch.summary: Deep code analysis and indexing across a codebase (via uvx).
jcodemunch.notes: uvx must be on PATH. Indexes under ~/.code-index/; run index_folder once per project. Ships a tool-selection rule (references/rules/jcodemunch.md) the skill can drop into .claude/rules/ of the target project.

jdocmunch.summary: Ingest and query documentation (markdown, HTML, plain text) via uvx.
jdocmunch.notes: uvx must be on PATH. Index a documentation source once before querying it.
